title: Replacement strings should reference existing regular expression groups
description: In JavaScript, the String.prototype.replace() method is used to replace parts of a string with new substrings. It allows you to perform simple to complex string replacements based on either a static string or a regular expression pattern. When the first argument is a regular expression, the method will use the regular expression to search for matches within the original string and then replace those matches with the specified replacement.
recommendation: Replace with the recommended alternative approach.

checks.message: Replacement string references group that doesn't exist in regex pattern
